description_long: This guard rail features a robust, black metal construction with two vertical posts capped by pointed finials and a central post with a similar decorative top. The main body consists of two large, horizontally aligned oval frames, each bordered by curved and straight bars, providing both structural integrity and visual appeal. The design is symmetrical, with the ovals and bars forming a repeating geometric pattern. The posts are square in cross-section and appear to be solid, suggesting durability and resistance to impact. The surface is smooth and glossy, likely powder-coated for weather resistance. This type of guard rail is commonly used in urban parks, sidewalks, or as a decorative barrier along streets.
description: A black metal guard rail with pointed finials, two large oval frames, and a glossy, smooth finish. The design is decorative yet sturdy, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: A narrow, head-on view showing a single vertical post with a pointed finial and geometric detailing.
description_view_1: A frontal perspective displaying the full guard rail with two large oval frames, three posts, and decorative pointed tops.
description_view_2: Another narrow, head-on view of a single vertical post, similar to view 0, emphasizing the post's height and finial.
description_view_3: A frontal perspective nearly identical to view 1, showing the full guard rail with its oval frames and three posts.
